sanskrit:
उदासीनवदासीनो गुणैर्यो न विचाल्यते।
गुणा वर्तन्त इत्येव योऽवतिष्ठति नेङ्गते॥
transliteration:
udāsīna-vad āsīno guṇair yo na vicālyate |
guṇā vartanta ity eva yo ’vatiṣṭhati neṅgate ||
literal_meaning: Sitting like one unconcerned, he who is not shaken by the guṇas, knowing ‘the guṇas are moving’, stands firm and does not waver.
contextual_meaning: A mind that has metabolized its own reactivity neither resists nor chases inner states; it abides as the calm witness while personality patterns (sattva, rajas, tamas) play out.
psychological_state: Stable meta-awareness; observing affective waves without fusion or avoidance.
trigger_scenario: You notice your mood swing after scrolling social media, pause, label it “algorithm-induced rajas,” and keep breathing without deleting the app or binge-scrolling.
anchor_text: Watch thoughts and moods pass like clouds, staying steady within.
